source: [Shadowing practice — no source text. Evaluate delivery quality only: fluency, naturalness, pacing, and pronunciation accuracy.]
rendition: Thank you.  I'm honored to be with you today for the commencement of one of the finest universities in the world.

strengths: Appropriate formal register and dignified tone for commencement context
Strong opening with confident delivery of 'Thank you'
Good pacing on the main clause 'I'm honored to be with you today'
improvements: Slight hesitation before 'commencement'—practice the transition from 'today for' to maintain forward momentum
The phrase 'one of the finest universities in the world' feels slightly rushed at the end; slow down subtly on this closing phrase for more impact
Add a micro-pause after 'today' to separate ideas more distinctly and enhance clarity
scores.summary: Your delivery demonstrates solid fluency with clear pronunciation and appropriate formality for a commencement context. Minor pacing adjustments on transitions and the closing phrase would elevate the naturalness and allow the audience to fully absorb each idea.
